Container.Name: CacheDeck
Container.Overview: Browser controls and an interactive console for an existing SteamPrefill container.
Container.Description: CacheDeck provides a cleaner browser interface for SteamPrefill and LANCache. Select games, start prefill jobs, inspect status, view recent logs and use the interactive SteamPrefill terminal without opening an Unraid console.
Container.Requires: An existing SteamPrefill container. CacheDeck requires access to the Docker socket and should remain accessible only on trusted networks.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port used to open the CacheDeck web interface.

Config.Name: Docker Socket
Config.Description: Required so CacheDeck can execute commands in SteamPrefill.

Config.Name: SteamPrefill Container
Config.Description: Exact name of the existing SteamPrefill container.

Config.Name: SteamPrefill Directory
Config.Description: SteamPrefill installation directory inside the target container.

Config.Name: SteamPrefill User
Config.Description: Linux user CacheDeck should use inside the target container.
